subcodes.first_line: O Ism-i-Júd! Upon thee be My Glory! The letters of the esteemed Samandar, upon him be My Glory, which he hath addressed unto thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا اسم جود علیک بهائی نامهای جناب سمندر علیه بهائی که بانجناب ارسال داشته
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @eulogies; reminiscences, @goodly deeds; actions, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @unity; oneness of humanity
